Eu chief: Europe needs bold, innovative companies that can compete on the global stage. We have the talent. Now we must create the environment for Europe’s next champions. Today, we are publishing our draft merger guidelines to better support companies to thrive, scale, and innovate.

Ayatollah Isa Qassim, the leader of Bahrain's Shia community, reacted to the kingdom's decision to revoke the citizenship of 69 citizens due to their connection with foreign entities and considered it a violation of the constitution.- reports from Iran

data.title: Online-Only Banking Providers Continue to Win Over Customers with Personalized Digital Experiences, but Some Struggle with Customer Service Quality, JD Power Finds
data.description: In Troy, Michigan, a recent study by JD Power revealed that online-only banking providers are increasingly popular among customers due to their personalized digital experiences. However, these providers are facing challenges in terms of customer service. The study highlighted the growing trend of customers favoring online banking, with an emphasis on the importance of tailored digital interactions. Despite this, online-only banking providers are struggling to deliver satisfactory customer service experiences, indicating a need for improvement in this area.

data.title: Startup Moldova Summit 2026 spotlights Moldova's rise as a startup gateway to European markets
data.description: Chișinău in Moldova hosted the Startup Moldova Summit 2026, highlighting the country's emergence as a hub for startups seeking investment, skilled individuals, and access to the EU market. The event drew more than 2,000 attendees, featured 150 startups, included 60 speakers, and attracted international investors to the region.

data.title: The Jewish Theological Seminary Names Rabbi Mike Uram as Next Chancellor
data.description: In anticipation of Chancellor Shuly Rubin Schwartz's scheduled departure at the end of the current academic year, the Jewish Theological Seminary (JTS) in New York has finalized key appointments to ensure ongoing growth and stability. These strategic moves position JTS strongly for future expansion. The transition is set to take place on April 30, 2026. This marks a significant moment in the institution's history, as it prepares to continue its legacy as a leading global hub for Jewish studies and education.

data.title: 5WPR Showcases Beauty PR and Digital Marketing Expertise Through High-Impact Cultural and Industry Moments
data.description: On April 30, 2026, a New York-based PR and digital marketing agency, 5WPR, announced its specialty in assisting brands during significant cultural and industry events. As one of the largest agencies in the U.S., 5WPR provides support to partners in leveraging these moments to enhance their visibility and impact.

data.title: Exiger Advances AI-Native Supply Chain Intelligence at 2026 SCSP AI+ Expo
data.description: A prominent technology event in Washington, DC brought together 20,000 key figures from academia, the military, industry, and government sectors, covering a wide range of fields including AI, biotech, advanced manufacturing, robotics, defense, and cybersecurity. The event took place on April 30, 2026. Exiger, a top player in AI for supply chain management, was highlighted as the event's largest provider.

data.title: Opus Redefines Financial Leadership Structure to Accelerate Strategic Growth; Promotes Pete Conlon and Su O'Sullivan
data.description: In Minneapolis on April 30, 2026, Opus revealed the appointment of Pete Conlon as the new chief financial officer and head of capital markets, along with Su O'Sullivan being promoted to the role of executive vice president of accounting. These advancements are set to take effect on May 4, 2026. The reshuffling of positions is part of Opus' strategic move towards its upcoming phase, emphasizing leadership transition within the company.

data.title: IEEE‑USA Unveils BiG Thinkers: A First‑of‑Its‑Kind Event Uniting Emerging Tech Leaders and Creative Visionaries
data.description: Renowned innovators from leading companies such as Disney, OpenAI, Pixar, Microsoft, and NVIDIA have recently partnered with IEEE-USA, a prominent advocate for American engineers and technologists. This collaboration aims to motivate and educate the upcoming generation of technology professionals in the United States. The announcement was made in Washington on April 29, 2026, highlighting the importance of this initiative. By joining forces with experts from these influential organizations, IEEE-USA is signaling a strong dedication to nurturing and inspiring future professionals in the field.

data.title: Oakworth Capital Bank Welcomes J. Winston Busby as Wealth Strategist, Expands Oakworth's Client Experience
data.description: Today, Oakworth Capital Bank in Birmingham, Alabama, welcomed J. Winston Busby, J.D., LL.M. as their new wealth strategist. With this new addition, the bank aims to provide specialized financial guidance to closely-held business owners, professionals, and families facing intricate financial situations.

data.title: NORTIV 8 Advances Footwear Innovation Through Sole Engineering and Terrain-Responsive Design Across Performance and Hybrid Categories
data.description: NORTIV 8 has unveiled a groundbreaking innovation platform centered on the outsole design, featuring wide toe outsole geometry and amphibious drainage systems. This platform is set to revolutionize footwear performance in various terrains, speeds, and conditions. The announcement was made in New York on April 30, 2026, by NORTIV 8. This move comes at a time when the footwear industry is undergoing significant transformation.

data.title: Efekta Education Named a TIME100 Most Influential Company for 2026
data.description: In London on April 30, 2026, TIME magazine included Efekta Education in its prestigious TIME100 Most Influential Companies list for 2026. This acknowledgment highlights companies that are significantly impacting the global landscape. Efekta Education stood out for its advancements in AI-based language teaching.

data.title: Mattamy Homes Opens Decorated Models at The Bridges at Preston Crossings in Gunter, TX
data.description: Mattamy Homes has introduced eight new home designs for sale in a serene and luxurious golf course environment, with professional décor enhancing the appeal of two of these designs. The Bridges at Preston Crossings, located in Gunter, Texas, is the setting for these newly available homes. Decorated models are now welcoming visitors to this upscale community, offering a glimpse into the resort-style living experience. This development by Mattamy Homes is attracting attention as it presents a unique blend of modern design concepts combined with the tranquility of a golf course setting. The community is now open for interested buyers to explore the properties and envision themselves living in this exclusive neighborhood.

data.title: Whitworth Online Partners with InScribe to Strengthen Community for Online Adult Learners
data.description: A new collaboration has been formed between InScribe Education and Whitworth Online, introducing "The Cove," a virtual platform aimed at fostering community and facilitating student success within Whitworth's online programs. This initiative, unveiled in Denver and Spokane, Washington on April 30, 2026, is set to enhance connectivity, a sense of belonging, and academic achievement among students.

data.title: Full-Category, Full-Powertrain, All-Scenario: GAC's Global Mobility Era Debuts at Auto China 2026
data.description: In Beijing on April 24, 2026, GAC International hosted a significant global launch event during Auto China 2026, revealing an enhanced global strategy system. The event garnered substantial attention, attracting around 330 attendees, including dealers and industry professionals.
